items.title: Man on trial for rape that saw Andy Malkinson wrongfully jailed
items.description: Paul Quinn denies raping a woman in a case that led to one of the "very worst" miscarriages of justice.

items.title: First government flight for UK nationals due to leave Middle East tonight
items.description: Some British nationals are being invited to board the flight from the capital of Oman later on Wednesday.

items.title: Partner of Labour MP arrested on suspicion of spying for China, BBC told
items.description: He is one of three unnamed men who the Met Police suspect of assisting Chinese intelligence services in the UK.

items.title: UK stock market calms but oil prices rise over fears Iran war may drag on
items.description: European markets are trading a little higher but gas and crude prices remain volatile.

items.title: Satellite images show Iranian navy and nuclear sites hit by US-Israeli strikes
items.description: US-Israeli strikes have destroyed at least 11 Iranian naval vessels, images reviewed by BBC Verify show.
